##RRUFFID=R120171
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=BeY(SiO_4_)(OH)
##LOCALITY=Zagi Mountain, Hameed Abad Kafoor Dheri, Peshawar, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ikram Mineralogy
##DESCRIPTION=Dark green to brown, dependent on light source, prismatic single crystal
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Be(Y_0.490_La_0.004_Ca_0.034_Pr_0.009_Nd_0.072_Sm_0.055_Eu_0.103_Gd_0.015_Tb_0.089_Dy_0.012_Ho_0.023_Er_0.002_Tm_0.017_Yb_0.014_Lu_0.001_Fe_0.037_Ca_0.006_)(SiO_4_)(OH) ; H and Be assumed
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
